visual: Pulls both hands back toward the chest palms-up in a withdrawing motion, then pushes both palms forward in a bow stance.
motion_description: From a right bow stance with the right arm extended, the weight shifts back onto the left leg as the left hand slides forward under the right arm and both palms turn upward. The hands separate and lift slightly, then draw back toward the chest in a continuous withdrawing motion as the weight settles fully on the rear leg. Maintaining a slow and steady tempo, the weight shifts forward into a right bow stance while both palms push outward at chest height.
